meaning: adj.极广大的,无边的,<口>非常好的
examples: The immense difficulties facing European businessmen in Russia were only too evident.
If it had hit the Earth, it would have made a crater 100 miles across and thrown up an immense cloud of dust.
That makes it a perfect tone-setter for the immense, thematically arranged outpouring that follows.
The matchup between two German teams in the European final has evoked immense pride in Germany.
